sections.paragraph:
- Original: περιέχω

- Transliteration: Periecho

- Phonetic: per-ee-ekh'-o

- Definition:

1. to surround, encompass

a. to contain: of the subject-matter, contents, of a writing

b. to take possession of, to seize

- Origin: from G4012 and G2192

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4012 and G2192; to hold all around that is include clasp (figuratively): - + astonished contain after [this manner].
